blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,873 ft. Looking ahead, 33 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
